raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 33,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Irrag to Paganu Dee-
wi itkatrs fatvu Semini iglah-
bis / no to Affirexu kehnixa
Rohkas?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 34,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Kur irr tee Deewi no Ge-
mata un no Arwadas? kur irr
tee Deewi no Sewarwaim/ Ge-
nas un Iwas? irrag tee Sama-
riju no mannas Rohkas iglah-
buscht?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 35,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Kuxri starp wiꞥſchem Dee-
weem tahs Semmes/ irr fatwu
Semmi no mannas Rohkas at-
pestijtchi ? ka tain KUNGA̅M
bij Jerusalemi no mannas Roh-
kas atpestiht?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 36,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet tee Laudis zeete kluf-
fu/ un ne atbildeja tam ne wee-
nu Wahrdu / jo tas kehnixsch
bij pawehlejs/ un fazzijjs: Jums
ne buhs atbildeht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 37,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad nahze Elijakinis Il-
kius Dehls tas Aumeisteris/ un
Sebena tas Skrihweris/ un Jo-
nks Ałapa Dehls tas Kanzleris/
pee Istiju ar japlohttahm Dreh-
behm/ un stahftija winnam Rab-
sakus Wahrdus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": �,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta XIX. Nodalla.
Istijus fohti behdigs: 1. Guhds tam KUN-
GAM Rabsakus un Saneriba Saimoscha-
uas: 2. Kas winnu zaur to Praweetu Esaiju
atkat eepreezina : 6. Lee Asfirexi saimo oh-
trukahrt to KUNGU: 8. Istijus peeluhds
firđigi Deewu lai tas winnu paglabbj: 14.
Ro wiꞥſch arri dabbu/ un tohp no ta KUM-
GA Engela jints astondefmits nu peež tuhk-
foichi Wihri eekſch to Affirexu Lehgera ap:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ad nu tas kehnixsch
Istijus to dsirdeja/ fa-
plohfija wiꞥſch fawas
Drehbes/ un apwilke Maifin / un
gahje ta KUNGA Nammā.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Pehz fuhtija wiꞥſch Elija-
kimu to Aumeisteri/ un Sebenu
to Skrihwerti/ un tohs wezzakus
Preesterus ar Maifeem apfegtus/
pee to Praweetu Esaiju Anoza
Dehlu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tee fazzija us to: Ta-
fakka Istijus: Schi Deena irr
Behdu Deena/ un Lammascha-
nas Deena/ un Saimoschanas
Deena. Jo tee Behrni irr us
Dsimschanu nahkuschi/ un Speh-
ka newaid dseindeht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jaschu tas KUNGS taws
Deews wiꞥſus Wahrdus Rab-
sakus dsirdehs/ ko wiꞥſa Kungs
tas kehnixsch no Affirijas fuht-
tijs irr / to dsihwn Deewu ap-
mehtdiht/ un ar Wahrdem lam-
maht/ ko tas KUNGS taws
Deewsiir dsirdejs/tapehz zellees/
un luhs par teem Atliftuscheim/
kas wehl atrohdahs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un ta kehnixa Istijus Kal-
pi nahze pee Esaiju /
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Esaijus fazzija us teem:
Ta buhs jums tawam Kungam
fazziht: Ta fakka tas KUNGS:
Ne bihstees par teem Wahrdem/
ko tu effi dsirdejs/ ar ko ta keh-
nixa no Affirijas Sullaini mann
irr satinojschi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Raugi/ Es dohſchu tam
E e ece
tah.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
